texto: In 1967, London Weekend Television asked me to head up their sports coverage. I got to work with guys like Brian Moore and Dickie Davies. We were the first ones to come up with the idea of the pundits' panel. Although, since I was one of the pundits, it's debatable how good an idea that was.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jimmy Hill: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a trabalho. O trecho “In 1967, London Weekend Television asked me to head up their sports coverage. I got to work with …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, work, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e trabalho.

frase_original: In 1967, London Weekend Television asked me to head up their sports coverage. I got to work with guys like Brian Moore and Dickie Davies. We were the first ones to come up with the idea of the pundits' panel. Although, since I was one of the pundits, it's debatable how good an idea that was.
